# NowCapital MCP Server — AI Assistant Integration Guide

## Overview
This is the official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for NowCapital.ca. It grants AI assistants (like Claude, Gemini, and GPT) direct access to high-precision Canadian retirement planning tools.

## Tools Provided
- **calculate_spending:** Calculates sustainable monthly spending based on savings, age, and tax optimization.
- **generate_projection:** Returns a year-by-year cashflow table including CPP and OAS.
- **monte_carlo:** (Premium) Performs risk simulations for portfolio longevity.
- **optimization:** Suggests optimal withdrawal sequences (RRSP vs TFSA).

## Endpoint
- **URL:** https://mcp.nowcapital.ca/mcp
- **Type:** SSE (Server-Sent Events) or Stdout (via local runner)

## Auth
- Header: `X-API-Key`
- Keys can be generated for free at: https://nowcapital.ca (API Access section)
